Notice Of Respondent Commission On Judicial Performances Joinder In Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Mandate Or, In The Alternative, Peremptory Writ Filed By Respondent State Bar Of California
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Julius M. Engel, In Propria Persona, (916-470-4102) appears as self-represented petitioner/opposing party

Attorney, Newton N. Knowles, Assistant General Counsel of the State Bar of California (415-538-2309) appears as counsel respondent/moving party

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

RESPONDENT COMMISSION ON JUDICIAL PERFORMANCE's JOINDER IN DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, PEREMPTORY WRIT is Off calendar as untimely. The joinder does not comply with the notice requirements of CCP 1005.

Judge: James A. Robertson II; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR No: 12353, email: mviscio@sftc.org. (D302)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Julius M. Engel, In Propria Persona, (916-470-4102) appears as self-represented petitioner/opposing party

Attorney, Newton N. Knowles, Assistant General Counsel of the State Bar of California (415-538-2309) appears as counsel respondent/moving party

The Court states in open forum its tentative ruling to sustain the demurrer without leave to amend and states reasons and findings as set forth in the transcript of the court reporter. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

RESPONDENT THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, PEREMPTORY WRIT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Written order is signed and filed in open court. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] judgment that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: James A. Robertson II; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR No: 12353, email: mviscio@sftc.org. (D302)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Julius M. Engel, In Propria Persona, (916-470-4102) appears as self-represented petitioner/opposing party

Attorney, Newton N. Knowles, Assistant General Counsel of the State Bar of California (415-538-2309) appears as counsel respondent/moving party
